title: 假日旅途中的意外帮助
sentences: Tom is a young writer, and Anna is an adult.
Before a holiday trip, Anna gives Tom some advice about the weather.
Tom says that his bag is ready, but his warm coat is still at home.
When they arrive at the station, the sky is dark and the rain begins.
Anna sits on a chair while Tom wants to find a place to buy a coat.
A second adult is waiting near the door with a large bag.
The adult sees Tom and puts a coat on the chair.
You may use it during the trip.
Tom remembers the advice from Anna and feels sorry because he did not listen.
On the train, the adult tells them that he is also a writer.
They talk about the village, the river, and a story with a strange end.
When the train is at the village, the rain is over and their holiday can begin.
That night, Tom writes about the trip, the chair, and the advice that can help him.
Anna reads the story and says that the new writer can use better advice next time.
translations: 汤姆是一名年轻作家，安娜是一位成年人。
假日旅行前，安娜给了汤姆一些关于天气的建议。
汤姆说他的包已经准备好了，但保暖外套还在家里。
他们到达车站时，天空变暗，雨也开始下了。
安娜坐在椅子上，汤姆则想找个地方买外套。
另一位成年人提着一个大包，在门边等候。
那位成年人看见汤姆，把一件外套放在椅子上。
旅行期间你可以穿它。
汤姆想起安娜的建议，因为自己没有听从而感到后悔。
在火车上，那位成年人告诉他们，他也是一名作家。
他们谈到村庄、河流，以及一个结局奇怪的故事。
火车到达村庄时，雨已经停了，他们的假期可以开始了。
那天晚上，汤姆写下了这次旅行、那把椅子和能够帮助他的建议。
安娜读完故事后说，这位新作家下次可以更好地听取建议。

title: 拱门下的小蚂蚁
sentences: Tom and Anna are in a room near an arch.
The arch has a red colour and a black colour.
Anna has a form on the table.
Tom has a meal in a box.
An ant is on the form.
Tom does not see the ant.
Anna sees the ant and looks at Tom.
Anna has good humour about the small ant.
The meal is now near the ant.
The small form has a white colour.
The ant is under the arch, and the meal is on the table.
Tom has humour about the ant and the meal.
Anna and Tom see the arch, the form, and the ant.
The small ant has a meal, and Tom and Anna are good.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在一个靠近拱门的房间里。
这座拱门有红色和黑色两种颜色。
安娜把一张表格放在桌上。
汤姆有一份装在盒子里的饭。
一只蚂蚁爬到了表格上。
汤姆没有看见那只蚂蚁。
安娜看见蚂蚁后看向汤姆。
安娜觉得这只小蚂蚁很有趣。
那份饭现在放在蚂蚁附近。
这个小造型是白色的。
蚂蚁在拱门下面，饭放在桌上。
汤姆觉得蚂蚁和那份饭很有趣。
安娜和汤姆看着拱门、表格和蚂蚁。
小蚂蚁得到了一顿饭，汤姆和安娜也很开心。

title: 头顶上的盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna are near the red arch.
A small box is on the head of a man.
The man is not able to see the box.
Tom can be near the man.
Anna can be near Tom and look at the head.
The box is for a meal, and an ant is in it.
Tom is able to use the table for the box.
The man can go to the table and be near Anna.
Anna and Tom make a small arch of boxes.
The man can be under the arch, and the box is on the table.
The box is for Tom, and the meal is for the man.
Tom and Anna are able to see the man's head.
The man is able to go, and the box is for him.
Tom and Anna go to the room for a meal.
translations: 汤姆和安娜在红色拱门附近。
一个小盒子放在一名男子的头上。
那名男子看不到盒子。
汤姆可以走到男子身边。
安娜可以站在汤姆旁边看着男子的头。
盒子是用来装饭的，里面还有一只蚂蚁。
汤姆能够借助桌子把盒子取下来。
男子可以走到桌边，来到安娜附近。
安娜和汤姆用盒子搭了一个小拱门。
男子站在拱门下面，盒子则放到了桌上。
盒子给汤姆，饭给那名男子。
汤姆和安娜终于能看清男子的头了。
男子可以离开了，盒子也留给了汤姆。
汤姆和安娜回到房间吃饭。

title: 两本颜色不同的书
sentences: Tom and Anna are in a room with a man.
The man has a book from a woman.
Tom can say that the book is red.
Anna can say that the book is black.
The book is by the woman, but it is for the man.
Tom is with Anna, but the man is outside.
The man comes from outside and looks at the book.
Anna has a form by the door.
The woman comes from the room with a white book.
She can say that the red book is by her.
The man has the white book, but Tom has the red book.
Anna and Tom go from the door with the good form.
translations: 汤姆和安娜与一名男子待在一个房间里。
那名男子有一本来自一位女子的书。
汤姆说那本书是红色的。
安娜说那本书是黑色的。
这本书是那位女子写的，但它是给男子的。
汤姆和安娜在一起，但那名男子在外面。
男子从外面回来并查看那本书。
安娜在门边拿着一张表格。
那位女子从房间里出来，手里还有一本白色的书。
她说明红色的书是她写的。
男子拿到白色的书，而汤姆拿着红色的书。
安娜和汤姆带着填写好的表格离开门口。

title: 谁来拿红色的书
sentences: Tom and Anna are near the door with all the people.
Who will get the red book?
Tom or Anna will get the book.
All the people look at Tom and Anna.
Tom will go as Anna comes.
Anna will get the form, but Tom will get the book.
Who has the form, Tom or Anna?
Anna has the form as Tom has the book.
The man who is by the door has a meal.
All the people can see the meal.
Who can get the meal, Tom or Anna?
Tom and Anna get the meal for all the people.
translations: 汤姆和安娜与所有人一起站在门边。
谁会拿到那本红色的书？
汤姆或安娜会拿到那本书。
所有人都看着汤姆和安娜。
安娜过来时，汤姆会走过去。
安娜会拿表格，而汤姆会拿书。
表格在谁手里，是汤姆还是安娜？
安娜拿着表格，同时汤姆拿着书。
站在门边的男子有一份饭。
所有人都能看到那份饭。
谁能拿到那份饭，是汤姆还是安娜？
汤姆和安娜把饭拿给所有人。

title: 楼上的红色盒子
sentences: Tom and Anna have some food in a box.
When they go up to a room, the red box is not there.
Tom says that he can take the red box.
Anna says that she can take some food.
If Tom goes up, Anna will look near the door.
If Anna sees the box, she will say so.
They go up, but the box is not there.
When Tom looks under the table, he sees an ant.
The ant is on some food, so Tom does not take it.
Anna can take the box when the ant is outside.
If the ant comes up, Tom can use the small box.
Tom and Anna take some food to the room.
The ant has some food, so all can have a meal.
translations: 汤姆和安娜有一些装在盒子里的食物。
他们上楼进入一个房间时，红色盒子却不在那里。
汤姆说他可以把红色盒子拿回来。
安娜说她可以先拿一些食物。
如果汤姆上楼，安娜就会在门边寻找。
如果安娜看见盒子，她就会这样告诉汤姆。
他们再次上楼，但盒子还是不在那里。
汤姆查看桌子下面时，看见了一只蚂蚁。
蚂蚁爬在一些食物上，所以汤姆没有拿走它。
蚂蚁到外面后，安娜就可以拿起盒子。
如果蚂蚁再爬上来，汤姆可以使用小盒子。
汤姆和安娜把一些食物拿到房间里。
蚂蚁也得到了一些食物，所以大家都能吃上一顿饭。
